params.intro: Choose the correct statement. (Two lies and a truth)

summary: Academic Search Premier is a database that enables users to find scholarly resources through advanced search functions, including filters for full-text articles, peer-reviewed sources, publication dates, document types, and other criteria. It also supports Boolean search terms and offers research tools such as citation assistance and text-to-speech (read-aloud) features.
Academic Search Premier is not free for NCU library patrons.
Academic Search Premier is only for faculty members.
